title: Hardware
description: Our custom-built hardware solutions and innovations designed to support our project.

sections.text: To create a user-friendly platform for our biosensor, we designed and 3D-printed a custom microfluidic device. The device features a sample inlet, a reaction chamber containing the lyophilized cells, and a clear viewing window for colorimetric analysis.
